name: Single filer at high income in Neuchâtel (2026)
description: Single person earning CHF 200,000 in Neuchâtel, one of the highest-tax cantons

sources.description: Verified using Swiss tax calculation engine with progressive cantonal brackets. Federal tax calculated using official 2026 Bundessteuer tariff. Neuchâtel cantonal/municipal tax uses progressive marginal rates: 12% up to CHF 50k, 17% from CHF 50k-150k, 20% above CHF 150k = (50000×12% + 100000×17% + 50000×20%) = CHF 33,000. Social security includes ALV solidarity contribution (0.5% above CHF 148,200 cap). Neuchâtel has among Switzerland's highest tax rates.
Social security rates verified against BSV official documentation (ALV: 1.1% up to CHF 148,200, then 0.5% solidarity contribution)
